variables.name: focus/ring/width
variables.description: focus ring width — 2px (WCAG 2.4.13 floor; 3px for extra clarity)

variables.name: focus/ring/offset
variables.description: focus ring offset — 2px (separates ring from the element edge)

variables.name: focus/ring/offset-field
variables.description: focus ring offset, form fields — 0px (ring hugs the field; Primer)
